title: Add ARCH(q) and EWMA/RiskMetrics baseline forecasters
body:
## Why
ARCH and EWMA are foundational cvol benchmarks used in empirical comparisons.

## Proposal
- Add `ARCHForecaster(q=1..p)`
- Add `EWMAForecaster(lambda_=0.94 or estimated)`
- Both should implement `BaseForecaster` targeting `CONDITIONAL_VARIANCE`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] New forecaster classes with tests for fit/predict/update
- [ ] Added to model registry/docs
- [ ] Included in benchmark examples

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-01-arch-ewma-baselines.md`.

title: Implement FIGARCH forecaster for long-memory volatility
body:
## Why
FIGARCH is a canonical long-memory cvol model and appears in the knowledge graph, but is not executable in models code.

## Proposal
Add `FIGARCHForecaster` with robust parameter constraints and forecast positivity safeguards.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] FIGARCH class implementing BaseForecaster API
- [ ] Unit tests for constraints + positivity
- [ ] Benchmark/docs integration

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-02-figarch.md`.

title: Implement HEAVY model with realized measures
body:
## Why
HEAVY is a distinct realized-measure-driven framework and key comparator to Realized GARCH.

## Proposal
Add `HEAVYForecaster` with daily returns + realized measure input (`RV` by default).

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] fit/predict/update support
- [ ] Tests on synthetic realized-data DGP
- [ ] Docs + benchmark recipe

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-03-heavy.md`.

title: Add Stochastic Volatility family (SV, SV-J)
body:
## Why
SV models are foundational latent-state alternatives to GARCH and currently absent as runnable forecasters.

## Proposal
Implement `SVForecaster` and `SVJForecaster` with at least one inference backend (particle filter / quasi-MLE / Bayesian).

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] BaseForecaster-compatible SV implementation
- [ ] Optional jump variant
- [ ] Reproducible synthetic-SV tests

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-04-stochastic-volatility.md`.

title: Implement score-driven (GAS/DCS) volatility models
body:
## Why
GAS provides a structurally different observation-driven class via score updates of the conditional density.

## Proposal
Add `GASVolForecaster` supporting Normal and Student-t innovations.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] fit/predict/update API
- [ ] Stability + positivity tests
- [ ] Docs on GAS vs GARCH usage

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-05-gas.md`.

title: Add Markov-switching volatility models
body:
## Why
Regime changes (calm/crisis) are not captured by single-regime models and are important for cvol forecasting.

## Proposal
Add `MSGARCHForecaster` or `MSVolForecaster` with 2+ latent regimes and Hamilton filter/EM inference.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] One-step and multi-step forecasts
- [ ] Synthetic regime-recovery tests
- [ ] Benchmarks showing stress-period behavior

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-06-markov-switching.md`.

title: Implement MIDAS volatility models (GARCH-MIDAS / HAR-MIDAS)
body:
## Why
MIDAS bridges short-run and long-run components with low-frequency predictors for horizon-specific cvol forecasting.

## Proposal
Implement `GARCHMIDASForecaster` first, with optional follow-up `HARMIDASForecaster`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] At least one MIDAS model with constraints
- [ ] Tests with synthetic low-frequency drivers
- [ ] Example for horizon-specific forecasts

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-07-midas.md`.

title: Add quantile-native volatility/risk methods (CAViaR)
body:
## Why
Variance-only forecasts miss tail-risk use cases; CAViaR introduces conditional quantile dynamics.

## Proposal
Add `CAViaRForecaster` variants and evaluation hooks for quantile calibration.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] CAViaR model + quantile coverage tests
- [ ] Evaluation utilities for quantile diagnostics
- [ ] Docs clarifying complementarity with variance models

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-08-caviar.md`.

title: Add executable ML volatility wrappers (LSTM/Transformer/RF)
body:
## Why
Knowledge graph/docs mention LSTM/Transformer/RF methods but no runnable forecasters currently exist in `volforecast.models`.

## Proposal
Add `LSTMVolForecaster`, `TransformerVolForecaster`, and `RFVolForecaster` with deterministic defaults and clear feature contracts.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Models exported in `volforecast.models`
- [ ] CI-friendly smoke tests
- [ ] Docs mark these as experimental vs econometric baselines

Reference draft: `docs/issues/issue-09-ml-wrappers.md`.
